title: SkillSync
description: Designed internship listing and matching flows for students and SMEs, with backend logic in Flask and SQL-backed data handling.
highlights: Designed and developed core listing and matching flows for students and SMEs.
Built backend logic using Python (Flask) with SQL-based data handling.
Implemented frontend interactions in JavaScript with focus on usability.

title: Supetama (Client Project)
tagline: Hospitality staffing platform with AI-assisted features
description: Building a web application for a hospitality staffing business to manage staff hiring, matching, and communication, with AI-powered assistance.
bullets: Developing a staffing platform to match workers with hospitality roles based on skills and availability.
Implementing AI-assisted matching to recommend suitable candidates for job roles.
Integrating a chatbot to assist users with navigation, queries, and platform usage.
Exploring facial recognition for identity verification and security (prototype stage).
Working directly with a client to gather requirements and iterate on features.

title: Active-Community
tagline: PHP web app for sessions + reviews
description: Implemented authentication, profile management, session booking, reviews, and instructor approval flows in PHP.
highlights: Developed authentication and profile management features.
Built session booking, reviews, and instructor approval workflow.
Improved app stability and UI clarity through iterative testing.

title: QuickStrip (Team 26)
description: Delivered frontend features for a client prototype and supported AI element integration in a cross-disciplinary team.
highlights: Built frontend interface components with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Supported AI feature integration with cross-disciplinary teammates.
Contributed to Agile-style planning, testing, and iteration cycles.
